```text
     1→# CLAUDE.md
     2→
     3→This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.
     4→
     5→## Overview
     6→
     7→Lexical-based rich editor ecosystem. Modular packages: core editor, UI primitives, content renderers, plugins, extensions, and integration bundles.
     8→
     9→**Build**: Vite 7 + Vanilla Extract CSS-in-TS. ESM only (`.mjs`). TypeScript 5.9. Lexical 0.41.
    10→
    11→## Terminology: Static / Edit Split
    12→
    13→The editor ecosystem splits both **nodes** and **renderers** into static (read-only) and edit (editor-only) variants for bundle optimization.
    14→
    15→### Four Concepts
    16→
    17→| Term | Layer | Purpose | Example |
    18→|------|-------|---------|---------|
    19→| **Static Node** | Lexical node class | Deserialize JSON + `decorate()` returns `RendererWrapper`. No edit UI imports. | `CodeBlockNode`, `AlertQuoteNode` |
    20→| **Edit Node** | Lexical node class | Extends static node, overrides `decorate()` to use edit decorator with heavy deps (Popover, NestedComposer, etc.) | `CodeBlockEditNode`, `AlertQuoteEditNode` |
    21→| **Static Renderer** | React component | Display-only rendering. No `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` or `lucide-react` imports. | `AlertRenderer`, `MermaidRenderer` |
    22→| **Edit Renderer** | React component | Adds edit UI (DropdownMenu, Popover, presentDialog). Imports `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`. | `AlertEditRenderer`, `MermaidEditRenderer` |
    23→
    24→### Bundle Optimization Strategy
    25→
    26→```
    27→RichRenderer (read-only display)          RichEditor (full editing)
    28→├── Static Nodes (config.ts)              ├── Edit Nodes (config-edit.ts)
    29→├── Static Renderers                      ├── Edit Renderers
    30→│   (enhancedRendererConfig)              │   (enhancedEditRendererConfig)
    31→└── Zero edit UI deps                     └── Full edit UI deps
    32→```
    33→
    34→**Key principle**: `RichRenderer` entry imports only static nodes + static renderers, so bundlers tree-shake all edit UI deps (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`, `lucide-react`, `LexicalNestedComposer`). `RichEditor` entry imports edit nodes + edit renderers that bring in these deps.
    35→
    36→**Split criteria**: Only split when the edit path introduces heavy imports absent from the static path. If edit logic is just a boolean prop with no extra imports (e.g. CodeBlock's `editable`), no split needed.
    37→
    38→### Registration
    39→
    40→| Config file | Contains | Used by |
    41→|-------------|----------|---------|
    42→| `@haklex/rich-editor` `src/config.ts` | `customNodes` / `allNodes` (16 static nodes) | `RichRenderer` |
    43→| `@haklex/rich-editor` `src/config-edit.ts` | `customEditNodes` / `allEditNodes` (edit variants) | `RichEditor` |
    44→| `@haklex/rich-renderers` `src/config.ts` | `enhancedRendererConfig` (11 static renderers) | `ShiroRenderer` |
    45→| `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit` `src/config.ts` | `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (12 edit renderers) | `ShiroEditor` |
    46→
    47→## Package Dependency Graph
    48→
    49→```
    50→@haklex/rich-kit-shiro (integration bundle for web app)
    51→├── @haklex/rich-editor (core: editor + renderer + nodes + plugins + styles)
    52→│   ├── @haklex/rich-editor-ui (headless Dialog, Dropdown, Popover via @base-ui/react)
    53→│   ├── @haklex/rich-headless (server-side Lexical node registry, zero React)
    54→│   └── @haklex/rich-style-token (theme tokens, CSS variables, variant presets)
    55→├── @haklex/rich-static-renderer (headless SSR engine, RichRenderer component)
    56→├── @haklex/rich-renderers (static-only renderer aggregator)
    57→│   └── @haklex/rich-renderer-{alert,banner,codeblock,image,linkcard,mention,mermaid,ruby,video}
    58→├── @haklex/rich-renderers-edit (edit-only renderer aggregator, depends on rich-renderers)
    59→│   └── edit renderers + edit nodes + FootnoteRenderer
    60→├── @haklex/rich-ext-code-snippet (multi-file code snippet, CodeMirror + @dnd-kit)
    61→│   └── @haklex/cm-editor (CodeMirror 6 base theme/language utilities)
    62→├── @haklex/rich-ext-embed (URL embeds: Twitter, YouTube, Bilibili, Codesandbox, Gist, GitHub)
    63→├── @haklex/rich-ext-excalidraw (Excalidraw whiteboard extension)
    64→├── @haklex/rich-ext-gallery (image gallery with drag-reorder and lightbox)
    65→├── @haklex/rich-plugin-block-handle (block add button + context menu)
    66→├── @haklex/rich-plugin-floating-toolbar (text formatting toolbar)
    67→├── @haklex/rich-plugin-link-edit (inline link editing popover)
    68→├── @haklex/rich-plugin-mention (@ mention typeahead with platform selection)
    69→├── @haklex/rich-plugin-slash-menu (typeahead slash commands)
    70→├── @haklex/rich-plugin-table (cell resizing + row/column handles)
    71→├── @haklex/rich-plugin-toolbar (top toolbar with formatting buttons)
    72→└── @haklex/rich-renderer-katex (KaTeX edit nodes: KaTeXBlockEditNode, KaTeXInlineEditNode)
    73→
    74→@haklex/rich-diff (standalone diff viewer, depends on core)
    75→@haklex/rich-editor-demo (dev playground, depends on all)
    76→```
    77→
    78→## Commands
    79→
    80→```bash
    81→# Build
    82→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor build            # BUILD_LIB=1 vite build
    83→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-static-renderer build
    84→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-kit-shiro build
    85→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-renderers build
    86→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-renderers-edit build     # depends on rich-renderers
    87→
    88→# Dev playground (hot reload, all features)
    89→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor-demo dev
    90→
    91→# Watch mode for core iteration
    92→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor dev:build
    93→```
    94→
    95→## Foundation Packages
    96→
    97→### @haklex/rich-style-token
    98→
    99→Centralized theme tokens and CSS variables. Provides `createThemeStyle()`, variant presets (`articleTheme`, `noteTheme`, `commentTheme`), color constants (`darkColors`, `lightArticleColors`), layout constants, and `PortalThemeProvider` for shadow DOM theming. Used by nearly all packages.
   100→
   101→### @haklex/rich-headless
   102→
   103→Server-side Lexical node registry with zero React dependency. Exports `allHeadlessNodes` (20 node classes for JSON parsing), `allHeadlessTransformers`, and `$toMarkdown()`. Two entry points: `./` (nodes) and `./transformers` (markdown conversion).
   104→
   105→### @haklex/cm-editor
   106→
   107→Shared CodeMirror 6 utilities: `baseTheme`, `getThemeExtensions()`, `loadLanguageExtension()`. Used by `rich-ext-code-snippet` and `rich-renderer-codeblock` for code editing.
   108→
   109→## Core: @haklex/rich-editor
   110→
   111→Four entry points: `./` (all), `./editor` (RichEditor), `./static` (RichRenderer), `./styles` (CSS variables only).
   112→
   113→### Directory Layout
   114→
   115→- `src/nodes/` — 16 custom `DecoratorNode` types (Spoiler, Mention, KaTeXInline, KaTeXBlock, Image, AlertQuote, CodeBlock, Footnote, FootnoteSection, Video, LinkCard, Details, GridContainer, Banner, Mermaid, Ruby) + 5 edit variants (AlertQuoteEdit, BannerEdit, CodeBlockEdit, FootnoteSectionEdit, GridEdit)
   116→- `src/plugins/` — 18 Lexical plugins (Alert, AutoFocus, AutoLink, BlockExit, BlockId, DragDrop, EditorRef, Footnote, HorizontalRule, Image, ImageUpload, KaTeX, MarkdownShortcuts, Mermaid, OnChange, SubmitShortcut)
   117→- `src/styles/` — Vanilla Extract: 3 variants × 2 color schemes = 6 theme classes
   118→- `src/transformers/` — 14 Markdown shortcut transformers (alert `>[!NOTE]`, KaTeX `$$`, mention `@`, spoiler `||`, footnote `[^1]`, ruby, container, grid, quote, superscript/subscript, insert, rich-blocks, code-block)
   119→- `src/context/` — 5 contexts: `ColorSchemeContext` (light/dark), `RendererConfigContext` (custom renderer injection), `ImageUploadContext` (upload function injection), `FootnoteDefinitionsContext`, `NestedContentRendererContext`
   120→- `src/components/renderers/` — built-in default renderers (Alert, Banner, CodeBlock, Footnote, FootnoteSection, Grid, Image, KaTeX, LinkCard, Mention, Mermaid, Ruby, Video) + static decorators (Alert, Banner, Grid)
   121→- `src/components/decorators/` — edit decorators (Alert, Banner, CodeBlock, Grid)
   122→
   123→**Context Provider value stability**: Never pass object literals as context provider `value`. Primitives (string, function) can be passed directly (e.g. `ColorSchemeContext`, `ImageUploadContext`). Objects must be wrapped in `useMemo` (e.g. `RendererConfigContext`).
   124→
   125→### Custom Node Pattern
   126→
   127→All custom content nodes extend `DecoratorNode<ReactElement>`:
   128→
   129→```typescript
   130→class FooNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
   131→  static importJSON(serialized) / exportJSON()
   132→  decorate() → <RendererWrapper type="Foo" props={...} />
   133→}
   134→export function $createFooNode(payload): FooNode
   135→export function $isFooNode(node): node is FooNode
   136→```
   137→
   138→`RendererWrapper` delegates to custom renderer (via `RendererConfig`) or falls back to built-in default.
   139→
   140→### Node: Edit / Render Split
   141→
   142→Nodes with heavy edit UI are split into two classes for tree-shaking:
   143→
   144→| Base Node (render-only) | Edit Node (editor-only) | Edit Dependency |
   145→|------------------------|------------------------|-----------------|
   146→| `AlertQuoteNode` | `AlertQuoteEditNode` | `AlertEditDecorator` + LexicalNestedComposer |
   147→| `BannerNode` | `BannerEditNode` | `BannerEditDecorator` + LexicalNestedComposer |
   148→| `CodeBlockNode` | `CodeBlockEditNode` | `CodeBlockEditDecorator` |
   149→| `FootnoteSectionNode` | `FootnoteSectionEditNode` | `FootnoteSectionEditRenderer` |
   150→| `GridContainerNode` | `GridEditNode` | `GridEditDecorator` |
   151→| `KaTeXBlockNode` | `KaTeXBlockEditNode`* | `KaTeXEditDecorator` + Popover |
   152→| `KaTeXInlineNode` | `KaTeXInlineEditNode`* | `KaTeXEditDecorator` + Popover |
   153→
   154→*KaTeX edit nodes live in `@haklex/rich-renderer-katex`, not in `rich-editor`.
   155→
   156→**Base node** `decorate()` returns `RendererWrapper` (or lightweight read-only decorator). No edit UI imports.
   157→
   158→**Edit node** extends base node, overrides `clone()` / `importJSON()` / `decorate()` to use the full edit decorator with heavy deps.
   159→
   160→Config files:
   161→- `src/config.ts` — `customNodes` / `allNodes` (render-only, used by `RichRenderer`)
   162→- `src/config-edit.ts` — `customEditNodes` / `allEditNodes` (edit nodes, used by `RichEditor`)
   163→
   164→**Adding a new node with edit UI**: Create base node with `RendererWrapper` in `decorate()`, then create `FooEditNode extends FooNode` overriding `decorate()` with edit decorator. Register base in `config.ts`, edit in `config-edit.ts`.
   165→
   166→### Plugin Pattern
   167→
   168→```typescript
   169→export const INSERT_FOO_COMMAND = createCommand<Payload>('INSERT_FOO_COMMAND')
   170→export function FooPlugin() {
   171→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
   172→  useEffect(() => editor.registerCommand(INSERT_FOO_COMMAND, handler, COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR), [editor])
   173→  return null
   174→}
   175→```
   176→
   177→## External Plugin Packages
   178→
   179→Plugins extracted into separate packages for independent versioning and tree-shaking:
   180→
   181→| Package | Key Export | Purpose |
   182→|---------|-----------|---------|
   183→| `@haklex/rich-plugin-block-handle` | `BlockHandlePlugin` | Block add button + context menu |
   184→| `@haklex/rich-plugin-floating-toolbar` | `FloatingToolbarPlugin` | Text formatting floating toolbar |
   185→| `@haklex/rich-plugin-link-edit` | `FloatingLinkEditorPlugin` | Inline link editing popover |
   186→| `@haklex/rich-plugin-mention` | `MentionMenuPlugin` | @ mention typeahead with platform selection |
   187→| `@haklex/rich-plugin-slash-menu` | `SlashMenuPlugin` | Typeahead slash commands for block insertion |
   188→| `@haklex/rich-plugin-table` | `TableCellResizerPlugin`, `TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin` | Table cell resizing + row/column handles |
   189→| `@haklex/rich-plugin-toolbar` | `ToolbarPlugin` | Top toolbar with formatting buttons, dropdowns, separators |
   190→
   191→All plugin packages depend on `@haklex/rich-style-token` for theming and export `./style.css`.
   192→
   193→## Extension Packages
   194→
   195→Extensions add complete features (nodes + renderers + plugins) with heavy isolated dependencies:
   196→
   197→| Package | Purpose | Key Deps |
   198→|---------|---------|----------|
   199→| `@haklex/rich-ext-code-snippet` | Multi-file code snippet with drag-reorder | `@haklex/cm-editor`, `@dnd-kit/*`, `shiki` |
   200→| `@haklex/rich-ext-embed` | URL embeds (Twitter, YouTube, Bilibili, Codesandbox, Gist, GitHub) | `react-tweet`, `lucide-react` |
   201→| `@haklex/rich-ext-excalidraw` | Excalidraw whiteboard (scene JSON + diff via jsondiffpatch) | `@excalidraw/excalidraw`, `jsondiffpatch` |
   202→| `@haklex/rich-ext-gallery` | Image gallery with drag-reorder and lightbox | `@dnd-kit/*`, `react-photo-view`, `thumbhash` |
   203→
   204→Extensions with static/edit split export dual entries: `./` (edit) and `./static` (render-only).
   205→
   206→## Variant System
   207→
   208→Controlled by `variant` prop + `ColorSchemeContext`. Theme CSS variables in `@haklex/rich-style-token` via `createThemeStyle()`.
   209→
   210→| Variant | Font | Size | Line-height | Max-width | Use case |
   211→|---------|------|------|-------------|-----------|----------|
   212→| article | system sans-serif | 16px | 1.75 | 65ch | Blog posts |
   213→| note | CJK serif (Noto Serif CJK SC) | 16px | 1.8 | 65ch | Personal notes |
   214→| comment | system sans-serif | 14px | 1.5 | none | Inline comments |
   215→
   216→## Renderer Config (Custom Renderer Injection)
   217→
   218→```typescript
   219→interface RendererConfig {
   220→  Alert?, Banner?, CodeBlock?, CodeSnippet?, Component?, Footnote?,
   221→  Gallery?, Image?, KaTeX?, LinkCard?, Mermaid?, Mention?,
   222→  Ruby?, Tabs?, Video?
   223→}
   224→<RichEditor rendererConfig={...} />
   225→<RichRenderer rendererConfig={...} />
   226→```
   227→
   228→## Individual Renderer Packages
   229→
   230→`@haklex/rich-renderer-*` packages provide feature-specific renderers with heavy dependencies isolated:
   231→- `alert` — GitHub-style alerts (info/warning/tip/caution/important)
   232→- `banner` — Colored banner container with nested content
   233→- `codeblock` — Shiki syntax highlighting
   234→- `image` — Blurhash/thumbhash, captions, accent colors
   235→- `katex` — KaTeX math equations (edit nodes only: `KaTeXBlockEditNode`, `KaTeXInlineEditNode`)
   236→- `linkcard` — Link preview cards
   237→- `mention` — Social platform mention badges
   238→- `mermaid` — Mermaid diagram rendering
   239→- `ruby` — Ruby annotation (furigana for Japanese text)
   240→- `video` — Responsive video players
   241→
   242→`@haklex/rich-renderers` aggregates all, with sub-path exports: `./codeblock`, `./mermaid`, etc.
   243→
   244→### Renderer: Edit / Static Split
   245→
   246→Renderer components with edit-only heavy deps are split into static and edit variants:
   247→
   248→| Package | Static (display-only) | Edit (with edit UI) | Edit Dependency |
   249→|---------|----------------------|---------------------|-----------------|
   250→| `rich-renderer-alert` | `AlertRenderer` | `AlertEditRenderer` | DropdownMenu (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`) |
   251→| `rich-renderer-banner` | `BannerRenderer` | `BannerEditRenderer` | DropdownMenu + Popover (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`) |
   252→| `rich-renderer-codeblock` | `CodeBlockRenderer` | `CodeBlockEditRenderer` | CodeMirror edit overlay |
   253→| `rich-renderer-image` | `ImageRenderer` | `ImageEditRenderer` | Upload/edit UI |
   254→| `rich-renderer-mention` | `MentionRenderer` | `MentionEditRenderer` | Popover (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`) + lucide-react |
   255→| `rich-renderer-mermaid` | `MermaidRenderer` | `MermaidEditRenderer` | presentDialog (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`) |
   256→| `rich-renderer-ruby` | `RubyRenderer` | `RubyEditRenderer` | Edit markup UI |
   257→| `rich-renderer-video` | `VideoRenderer` | `VideoEditRenderer` | Edit URL UI |
   258→| `rich-ext-code-snippet` | `CodeSnippetRenderer` | `CodeSnippetEditRenderer` | CodeMirror + @dnd-kit |
   259→| `rich-ext-excalidraw` | `ExcalidrawRenderer` | `ExcalidrawEditRenderer` | @excalidraw/excalidraw |
   260→| `rich-ext-gallery` | `GalleryRenderer` | `GalleryEditRenderer` | @dnd-kit + upload UI |
   261→
   262→Aggregator packages:
   263→- `@haklex/rich-renderers` — static-only. `enhancedRendererConfig` (`src/config.ts`), for `RichRenderer`. No edit deps.
   264→- `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit` — edit-only. `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (`src/config.ts`), for `RichEditor`. Spreads `enhancedRendererConfig` and overrides with edit variants. Also re-exports `FootnoteRenderer`.
   265→
   266→**Split criteria**: Only split when the edit path imports heavy deps (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui` components, `lucide-react` icons) absent from the static path. If edit logic is just a boolean flag with no extra imports, splitting adds complexity with no bundle benefit.
   267→
   268→**Adding a new renderer with edit UI**: Create `FooRenderer` (static) and `FooEditRenderer` (edit) in the same package. Export static from `./static` entry, edit from `./` entry. Add static to `enhancedRendererConfig` in `@haklex/rich-renderers`, edit to `enhancedEditRendererConfig` in `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit`.
   269→
   270→## Integration: @haklex/rich-kit-shiro
   271→
   272→Production bundle for the web app. Combines core + all renderers + all plugins + extensions.
   273→
   274→```typescript
   275→import '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/style.css'
   276→import { RichEditor } from '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/editor'       // → enhancedEditRendererConfig
   277→import { RichRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/renderer'   // → enhancedRendererConfig
   278→
   279→// Additional entry points:
   280→import '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/editor-core'     // core editor without renderers
   281→import '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/excalidraw'      // Excalidraw extension
   282→import '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/markdown'        // markdown conversion utilities
   283→import '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/nodes'           // all node classes
   284→import '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/plugins'         // all plugins
   285→import '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/renderers'       // static renderer config
   286→import '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/renderers-edit'  // edit renderer config
   287→import '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/style'           // style utilities
   288→```
   289→
   290→`ShiroEditor` uses `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (edit renderers). `ShiroRenderer` uses `enhancedRendererConfig` (static renderers). This ensures the renderer entry tree-shakes all edit UI deps (DropdownMenu, Popover, presentDialog, lucide-react edit icons).
   291→
   292→## Diff Viewer (@haklex/rich-diff)
   293→
   294→```typescript
   295→<RichDiff oldValue={...} newValue={...} variant="article" />
   296→```
   297→
   298→Compares two `SerializedEditorState` at node level. Side-by-side layout with insert/delete highlighting.
   299→
   300→## Build Configuration
   301→
   302→Shared Vite config factory in `haklex/vite.shared.ts` (`createViteConfig()`). Each package's `vite.config.ts` calls it with package-specific options (entry points, vanillaExtract toggle).
   303→
   304→- Auto-externalizes all `dependencies` + `peerDependencies` from each package's `package.json`
   305→- Vanilla Extract plugin for CSS-in-TS → static CSS (zero runtime)
   306→- Output: ESM `.mjs` + `.d.ts` declarations (via `vite-plugin-dts`)
   307→- Target: ES2020, no minification for JS, CSS minified
   308→
   309→## Styling
   310→
   311→Vanilla Extract (`*.css.ts` files) throughout. No Tailwind in editor packages. Theme contract defines CSS variables for colors, spacing, typography, and border-radius. Each variant+colorScheme combination produces a class name applied to the editor root.
   312→
   313→### Neutral colors
   314→
   315→Use a **neutral** (gray) color palette for secondary/muted text, borders, section labels, and descriptions—e.g. `#737373` / `#a3a3a3` (Tailwind neutral-500/400). Avoid tinted grays (slate, zinc, blue-gray) unless a design explicitly requires them. This keeps UI elements like slash menu sections and descriptions hue-neutral.
   316→
```

     4→import type { UserConfig } from 'vite'
     5→
     6→export interface SharedViteOptions {
     7→  entry?: string | Record<string, string>
     8→  vanillaExtract?: boolean
     9→  esbuild?: { jsx: string; jsxImportSource: string }
    10→}
    11→
    12→const BASE_EXTERNALS = ['react', 'react-dom', 'react/jsx-runtime']
    13→
    14→export async function createViteConfig(
    15→  options: SharedViteOptions = {},
    16→): Promise<UserConfig> {
    17→  const { entry = 'src/index.ts', vanillaExtract = true, esbuild } = options
    18→
    19→  const dts = (await import('vite-plugin-dts')).default
    20→  const plugins: UserConfig['plugins'] = []
    21→
    22→  if (vanillaExtract) {
    23→    const { vanillaExtractPlugin } =
    24→      await import('@vanilla-extract/vite-plugin')
    25→    plugins.push(vanillaExtractPlugin())
    26→  }
    27→
    28→  plugins.push(
    29→    dts({ entryRoot: 'src', outDir: 'dist', tsconfigPath: './tsconfig.json' }),
    30→  )
    31→
    32→  const cwd = process.cwd()
    33→  const isMap = typeof entry !== 'string'
    34→  const libEntry = isMap
    35→    ? Object.fromEntries(
    36→        Object.entries(entry).map(([k, v]) => [k, resolve(cwd, v)]),
    37→      )
    38→    : resolve(cwd, entry)
    39→
    40→  const fileName = isMap
    41→    ? (_: string, name: string) => `${name}.mjs`
    42→    : () => 'index.mjs'
    43→
    44→  const pkg = JSON.parse(readFileSync(resolve(cwd, 'package.json'), 'utf-8'))
    45→  const depNames = new Set([
    46→    ...BASE_EXTERNALS,
    47→    ...Object.keys(pkg.dependencies || {}),
    48→    ...Object.keys(pkg.peerDependencies || {}),
    49→  ])
    50→
    51→  const rollupExternal = (id: string) => {
    52→    if (id[0] === '.' || id[0] === '/' || id[0] === '\0') return false
    53→    if (depNames.has(id)) return true
    54→    const slashIdx = id.indexOf('/')
    55→    if (slashIdx > 0) {
    56→      const pkgName =
    57→        id[0] === '@'
    58→          ? id.slice(0, id.indexOf('/', slashIdx + 1))
    59→          : id.slice(0, slashIdx)
    60→      return pkgName ? depNames.has(pkgName) : false
    61→    }
    62→    return false
    63→  }
    64→
    65→  return {
    66→    plugins,
    67→    ...(esbuild && { esbuild }),
    68→    build: {
    69→      lib: { entry: libEntry, formats: ['es'], fileName },
    70→      rollupOptions: {

    72→        output: { preserveModules: false },

```text
     1→import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs'
     2→import { resolve } from 'node:path'
     3→
     4→import type { UserConfig } from 'vite'
     5→
     6→export interface SharedViteOptions {
     7→  entry?: string | Record<string, string>
     8→  vanillaExtract?: boolean
     9→  esbuild?: { jsx: string; jsxImportSource: string }
    10→}
    11→
    12→const BASE_EXTERNALS = ['react', 'react-dom', 'react/jsx-runtime']
    13→
    14→export async function createViteConfig(
    15→  options: SharedViteOptions = {},
    16→): Promise<UserConfig> {
    17→  const { entry = 'src/index.ts', vanillaExtract = true, esbuild } = options
    18→
    19→  const dts = (await import('vite-plugin-dts')).default
    20→  const plugins: UserConfig['plugins'] = []
    21→
    22→  if (vanillaExtract) {
    23→    const { vanillaExtractPlugin } =
    24→      await import('@vanilla-extract/vite-plugin')
    25→    plugins.push(vanillaExtractPlugin())
    26→  }
    27→
    28→  plugins.push(
    29→    dts({ entryRoot: 'src', outDir: 'dist', tsconfigPath: './tsconfig.json' }),
    30→  )
    31→
    32→  const cwd = process.cwd()
    33→  const isMap = typeof entry !== 'string'
    34→  const libEntry = isMap
    35→    ? Object.fromEntries(
    36→        Object.entries(entry).map(([k, v]) => [k, resolve(cwd, v)]),
    37→      )
    38→    : resolve(cwd, entry)
    39→
    40→  const fileName = isMap
    41→    ? (_: string, name: string) => `${name}.mjs`
    42→    : () => 'index.mjs'
    43→
    44→  const pkg = JSON.parse(readFileSync(resolve(cwd, 'package.json'), 'utf-8'))
    45→  const depNames = new Set([
    46→    ...BASE_EXTERNALS,
    47→    ...Object.keys(pkg.dependencies || {}),
    48→    ...Object.keys(pkg.peerDependencies || {}),
    49→  ])
    50→
    51→  const rollupExternal = (id: string) => {
    52→    if (id[0] === '.' || id[0] === '/' || id[0] === '\0') return false
    53→    if (depNames.has(id)) return true
    54→    const slashIdx = id.indexOf('/')
    55→    if (slashIdx > 0) {
    56→      const pkgName =
    57→        id[0] === '@'
    58→          ? id.slice(0, id.indexOf('/', slashIdx + 1))
    59→          : id.slice(0, slashIdx)
    60→      return pkgName ? depNames.has(pkgName) : false
    61→    }
    62→    return false
    63→  }
    64→
    65→  return {
    66→    plugins,
    67→    ...(esbuild && { esbuild }),
    68→    build: {
    69→      lib: { entry: libEntry, formats: ['es'], fileName },
    70→      rollupOptions: {
    71→        external: rollupExternal,
    72→        output: { preserveModules: false },
    73→      },
    74→      cssCodeSplit: false,
    75→      minify: false,
    76→      cssMinify: true,
    77→      target: 'es2020',
    78→    },
    79→  }
    80→}
    81→
```

    16→function getBlockElement(
    17→  editor: LexicalEditor,
    18→  target: HTMLElement,
    19→): HTMLElement | null {
    20→  const rootElement = editor.getRootElement()
    21→  if (!rootElement) return null
    22→
    23→  let current: HTMLElement | null = target
    24→  while (current && current !== rootElement) {
    25→    if (current.parentElement === rootElement) {
    26→      return current
    27→    }
    28→    current = current.parentElement
    29→  }
    30→  return null

    16→
    17→export type SerializedNestedDocNode = Spread<
    18→  {
    19→    content: SerializedEditorState
    20→  },
    21→  SerializedLexicalNode
    22→>
    23→
    24→export class NestedDocNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    25→  __contentState: SerializedEditorState
    26→
    27→  static getType(): string {
    28→    return 'nested-doc'
    29→  }
    30→
    31→  static clone(node: NestedDocNode): NestedDocNode {
    32→    return new NestedDocNode(node.__contentState, node.__key)
    33→  }
    34→
    35→  constructor(contentState?: SerializedEditorState, key?: NodeKey) {
    36→    super(key)
    37→    this.__contentState =
    38→      contentState ||
    39→      ({
    40→        root: {
    41→          children: [
    42→            {
    43→              type: 'paragraph',
    44→              children: [],
    45→              direction: null,
    46→              format: '',
    47→              indent: 0,
    48→              textFormat: 0,
    49→              textStyle: '',
    50→              version: 1,
    51→            },
    52→          ],
    53→          direction: null,
    54→          format: '',
    55→          indent: 0,
    56→          type: 'root',
    57→          version: 1,
    58→        },
    59→      } as unknown as SerializedEditorState)
    60→  }
    61→
    62→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    63→    const div = document.createElement('div')
    64→    div.className = 'rich-nested-doc'
    65→    return div
    66→  }
    67→
    68→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    69→    return false
    70→  }
    71→
    72→  isInline(): boolean {
    73→    return false
    74→  }
    75→
    76→  getContentState(): SerializedEditorState {
    77→    return this.getLatest().__contentState
    78→  }
    79→
    80→  setContentState(state: SerializedEditorState): void {
    81→    const writable = this.getWritable()
    82→    writable.__contentState = state
    83→  }
    84→
    85→  getTextContent(): string {
    86→    return extractTextContent(this.__contentState)
    87→  }
    88→
    89→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedNestedDocNode): NestedDocNode {

    91→  }
    92→

    94→    return {

    17→function createContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    18→  return createEditor({

    21→    theme: editorTheme,
    22→    onError: (error: Error) => {

    27→
    28→export class NestedDocEditNode extends NestedDocNode {
    29→  __contentEditor: LexicalEditor
    30→
    31→  static commandItems: CommandItemConfig[] = [
    32→    {
    33→      title: 'Nested Document',

    35→      description: 'Embed a collapsible nested document',
    36→      keywords: ['nested', 'document', 'nested-doc', 'embed'],
    37→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    38→      placement: ['slash', 'toolbar'],
    39→      group: 'insert',
    40→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    41→        editor.update(() => {
    42→          $insertNodes([$createNestedDocEditNode()])
    43→        })
    44→      },
    45→    },
    46→  ]
    47→
    48→  static clone(node: NestedDocEditNode): NestedDocEditNode {
    49→    const cloned = new NestedDocEditNode(node.__contentState, node.__key)
    50→    cloned.__contentEditor = node.__contentEditor

    52→  }
    53→
    54→  constructor(contentState?: SerializedEditorState, key?: string) {
    55→    super(contentState, key)
    56→    this.__contentEditor = createContentEditor()
    57→    if (contentState) {

    59→      this.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)

    61→  }

    64→    return this.__contentEditor
    65→  }

    86→      contentState: this.__contentState,

    11→export function NestedDocPlugin() {

    19→      },
    20→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR,
    21→    )
    22→  }, [editor])
    23→  return null
    24→}

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-03-06 18:25:46Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./haklex/rich-editor/src/utils/truncateEditorState.ts`

```text
     1→import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
     2→
     3→export function truncateEditorState(
     4→  state: SerializedEditorState,
     5→  maxNodes: number,
     6→): SerializedEditorState {
     7→  const root = state.root
     8→  if (!root?.children || root.children.length <= maxNodes) return state
     9→
    10→  return {
    11→    ...state,
    12→    root: {
    13→      ...root,
    14→      children: root.children.slice(0, maxNodes),
    15→    },
    16→  }
    17→}
    18→
    19→export function hasRenderableEditorState(
    20→  state: SerializedEditorState,
    21→): boolean {
    22→  const children = state.root?.children ?? []
    23→  if (children.length === 0) return false
    24→  if (children.length > 1) return true
    25→
    26→  const first = children[0] as
    27→    | {
    28→        type?: string
    29→        children?: Array<{
    30→          type?: string
    31→          text?: string
    32→        }>
    33→      }
    34→    | undefined
    35→
    36→  if (!first) return false
    37→  if (first.type !== 'paragraph') return true
    38→
    39→  return (
    40→    first.children?.some((child) => {
    41→      if (child.type !== 'text') return true
    42→      return Boolean(child.text?.trim())
    43→    }) ?? false
    44→  )
    45→}
    46→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→import {
     2→  $createHorizontalRuleNode,
     3→  INSERT_HORIZONTAL_RULE_COMMAND,
     4→} from '@lexical/extension'
     5→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     6→import {
     7→  $createParagraphNode,
     8→  $getSelection,
     9→  $isRangeSelection,
    10→  $isTextNode,
    11→  COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR,
    12→  COMMAND_PRIORITY_LOW,
    13→  KEY_ENTER_COMMAND,
    14→} from 'lexical'
    15→import { useEffect } from 'react'
    16→
    17→import { HORIZONTAL_RULE_REGEX } from '../transformers/horizontal-rule'
    18→
    19→export function HorizontalRulePlugin() {
    20→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    21→
    22→  useEffect(() => {
    23→    const unregisterInsert = editor.registerCommand(
    24→      INSERT_HORIZONTAL_RULE_COMMAND,
    25→      () => {
    26→        const selection = $getSelection()
    27→        if (!$isRangeSelection(selection)) return false
    28→
    29→        const focusNode = selection.focus.getNode()
    30→        const topLevel = focusNode.getTopLevelElement()
    31→        if (!topLevel) return false
    32→
    33→        const hrNode = $createHorizontalRuleNode()
    34→        const paragraph = $createParagraphNode()
    35→        topLevel.insertAfter(hrNode)
    36→        hrNode.insertAfter(paragraph)
    37→        paragraph.selectStart()
    38→        return true
    39→      },
    40→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR,
    41→    )
    42→
    43→    const unregisterEnter = editor.registerCommand(
    44→      KEY_ENTER_COMMAND,
    45→      (event: KeyboardEvent | null) => {
    46→        const selection = $getSelection()
    47→        if (!$isRangeSelection(selection) || !selection.isCollapsed()) {
    48→          return false
    49→        }
    50→
    51→        const anchorNode = selection.anchor.getNode()
    52→        if (!$isTextNode(anchorNode)) return false
    53→
    54→        const textContent = anchorNode.getTextContent()
    55→        if (!HORIZONTAL_RULE_REGEX.test(textContent)) return false
    56→
    57→        const parentNode = anchorNode.getParent()
    58→        if (!parentNode) return false
    59→
    60→        event?.preventDefault()
    61→
    62→        const hrNode = $createHorizontalRuleNode()
    63→        const paragraph = $createParagraphNode()
    64→        parentNode.replace(hrNode)
    65→        hrNode.insertAfter(paragraph)
    66→        paragraph.selectStart()
    67→        return true
    68→      },
    69→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_LOW,
    70→    )
    71→
    72→    return () => {
    73→      unregisterInsert()
    74→      unregisterEnter()
    75→    }
    76→  }, [editor])
    77→
    78→  return null
    79→}
    80→
